subject: A stocky armored goblin in dark plate armor with round goggles, holding a battle axe raised in one hand and a spiked sword in the other, standing against a golden storm sky with visible lightning
description: A goblin stands in a dominant wide-legged stance in the center of the frame. It wears dark metal plate armor with pauldrons and a closed helm topped with a small peak. Round goggle-lenses cover its eyes. Its green skin is visible at the cheeks and pointed ears. In its raised right hand it holds a battle axe; in its left hand it holds a spiked straight sword at its side. The background is a roiling golden-orange sky filled with thick storm clouds, and a white lightning bolt is visible in the upper portion. The flavor text names this goblin "Smurt," establishing a named (but non-IP) individual. The composition is a mid-shot portrait with the goblin occupying the full vertical center.
foreground: armored goblin with dark plate armor, goggles, raised axe, and spiked sword
background: golden-orange storm clouds with lightning bolt
emotion: defiant, chin up, slightly scowling — brash confidence
